title: Document Schema
description: Schema for municipal document export entities (reports, letters, motions, attachments and other RIS documents).

id.description: Unique deterministic hash or string identifier for the document.

schema_version.description: Semantic versioning string (e.g., 1.0.0) mapping to this contract.

title.description: The title or description of the document.

type.description: Compact normalized document type for filtering. Kept for backward compatibility.

document_type.description: Original document type label or value from the source RIS.

normalized_document_type.description: Compact normalized document type for filtering.

normalized_document_type_label.description: Human-readable Dutch label for the normalized document type.

date.description: Publication or formal tracking date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

url.description: Absolute source or download URL pointing to the original document location.

download_url.description: Absolute download URL for the document asset.

retrieved_at.description: Timestamp at which this document metadata was retrieved from the source RIS.

source_id.description: Document identifier from the source RIS.

source_object_id.description: Object identifier from the source RIS, when available.

filename.description: Filename supplied by the source RIS.

file_size_bytes.description: File size in bytes supplied by the source RIS.

text.description: Extracted text content from the document asset, if indexed.
